title: Java source files missing from workspace archive
evidence: find shows only pom.xml and README.md in archive; no src/ directory present; test-output.txt:15 references src/main/resources and test-output.txt:23 compiled 1 test source from src/test/java, confirming source existed at test time
suggestion: Investigate archiver — source was present when tests ran on codespace but not preserved in the archive
